## Safety Check

- [ ] No real customer-sensitive data, production invoices, PDF bodies, document bodies, or secrets are included.
- [ ] Screenshots/files are redacted.
- [ ] This is a review finding, not an approval or certification claim.

## Reviewer

- Reviewer name or identifier:
- Date:
- Area reviewed:
- Route/document/report:

## Finding

- Severity: Blocker / High / Medium / Low
- Accounting correctness concern:
- Recommended wording/layout:
- Screenshot/file reference:
- Must fix before beta: Yes / No
- Must fix before production: Yes / No
